name: Plural
description: Plural — Open-source platform for deploying and managing self-hosted applications on Kubernetes with GitOps workflows.

seo.title: Plural — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Plural: Plural — Open-source platform for deploying and managing self-hosted applications on Kubernetes with GitOps workflows.

when_to_use: Open-source GitOps platform for self-hosted Kubernetes apps
One-command Kubernetes deployment of popular OSS stacks
Managing Airflow, Grafana, Kafka self-hosted via Git workflow
Reducing overhead of self-hosting complex K8s applications
Alternative to Replicated for teams owning their infra

review.verdict: Clever approach to self-hosting enterprise apps on your cluster, still niche and early.
review.best_for: Platform teams wanting to self-host open-source apps on Kubernetes with less yak-shaving
review.not_for: Teams happy with raw Helm or those without Kubernetes infrastructure

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
